# TASKS: #67 — feat: create /ship L2 recipe for autonomous branch-to-main delivery
<!-- Generated by start-feature-planning | Plan sub-agent output -->

**Intent:** Implement the `/ship` L2 recipe through granular, dependency-ordered tasks — resolving the L1 modification gap and agent capability gap identified in the spec analysis, in addition to creating the new recipe files.

## Task Breakdown

#### T1: Create reference/intent.yaml
- **Files:** `core/components/recipes/ship/reference/intent.yaml` — create
- **Details:**
  - `intent`: "Deliver the current branch's completed work to the main branch — commit, create PR, review, merge, and return to main — with zero-friction autonomous execution"
  - `constraints.pre_flight`: C1 (not on main/master/develop with `halt_message`), C2 (remote configured with `halt_message`), C3 (issue number in branch name with `halt_message`)
  - `constraints.behavioral`: C4 (delegate to agents), C5 (≤5 distinct agents, recipe uses 2), C6 (guardian inline), C7 (self-resolution boundaries: CAN/CANNOT), C8 (evidence path pattern), C9 (auto-approve default, blockers listed), C10 (guardian evaluates inline), C11 (skip-logic for pre-satisfied steps)
  - `failure_conditions`: F1-F7 list entries
  - Follow exact YAML structure from `core/components/recipes/commit-code/reference/intent.yaml`
- **Depends on:** None
- **Expected Outcome:** Valid YAML at `core/components/recipes/ship/reference/intent.yaml` with all constraints and failure conditions
- **Verification:** G-004

#### T2: Create SKILL.md (L2 recipe core)
- **Files:** `core/components/recipes/ship/SKILL.md` — create
- **Details:**
  - Frontmatter: `name: ship`, `description: Deliver current branch work to main — commit, PR, review, merge, return`, `user-invocable: true`, `model: sonnet`, `allowed-tools: Task, Read, Write, TaskCreate, TaskUpdate, TaskList, TaskGet`
  - `## Intent`: standard load directive "BEFORE executing any step, read `reference/intent.yaml`"
  - `## Role`: orchestrator pattern; forbidden tools (Bash/Grep/Glob/git/gh); agent boundaries
  - `## Phases` table: 7 steps (0-6) with agents and L1 column
  - `## Workflow` with all steps:
    - Step 0: pre-flight via repo-orchestrator; expected output with state flags (uncommitted_changes, unpushed_commits, existing_pr, merge_conflicts); skip-logic derivation
    - Step 1: commit — skip condition; invoke commit-code via Skill tool with `ship_context.auto_approve: true`; guardian evaluation
    - Step 2: create-pr — skip condition; invoke create-pr via Skill tool with `ship_context.auto_approve: true`; guardian evaluation
    - Step 3: review — inline repo-orchestrator delegation using analyze-pr skill; expected output with merge_ready/blockers/conflicts; guardian evaluation with decision matrix
    - Step 4: merge — inline repo-orchestrator; `gh pr merge --squash --delete-branch`; self-resolution on errors
    - Step 5: return to main — inline repo-orchestrator; `git checkout {base_branch} && git pull`; self-resolution
    - Step 6: report — orchestrator-owned; write evidence to STM; present final-report
  - `## Guardian Behavior`: decision matrix (8 conditions); halt presentation referencing guardian-decision.md template
  - `## Self-Resolution Strategies` table: 6 resolvable blockers with max attempts; CANNOT list
  - `## Recovery`: pre-flight = hard halt; runtime = load intent-driven-recovery.md; max 2 retries
  - `## References` table: intent.yaml, checkpoint.md, guardian-decision.md, final-report.md
  - `## Version`: Level L2, Version 1.0.0, Distinct Agents 2, Checkpoint: Guardian-gated (auto-approve default)
- **Depends on:** T1
- **Expected Outcome:** Complete SKILL.md with full 7-step workflow
- **Verification:** G-002, G-003, G-005, G-006, G-007, G-008, G-009, G-010, G-015, G-016, G-017, G-018, G-019

#### T3: Create templates/checkpoint.md
- **Files:** `core/components/recipes/ship/templates/checkpoint.md` — create
- **Details:**
  - Header: `# Ship Checkpoint`
  - `## Metadata`: Issue, Recipe: ship, Step: {current} of 7, Created, Status (PENDING_APPROVAL|AUTO_APPROVED|HALTED|COMPLETED), Branch, Target
  - `## Task List` table: all 7 steps with Status and Agent columns
  - `## Completed Outputs`: results from each completed step
  - `## Guardian Decisions` table: After Step, Decision, Reason
  - `## Current Step`: what the recipe was doing when it checkpointed
  - `## Inputs Needed to Continue`: "None — continuing autonomously" or Tether/Vanish if halted
  - Follow `core/components/recipes/create-pr/templates/checkpoint.md` as structural pattern
- **Depends on:** None
- **Expected Outcome:** Template satisfying G-012 (ADR 008 schema)
- **Verification:** G-012

#### T4: Create templates/guardian-decision.md
- **Files:** `core/components/recipes/ship/templates/guardian-decision.md` — create
- **Details:**
  - Header: `# Guardian Decision: {step_name}`
  - `## Decision`: `AUTO-APPROVE` or `HALT`
  - `## Step`: `{step_number} — {step_name}`
  - `## Reason`: one sentence
  - `## Evidence Summary`: structured facts evaluated
  - `## Blockers` (HALT only): list with severity
  - `## Self-Resolution Attempted`: what was tried or "None"
  - If HALT: include Tether/Vanish options with consequences
- **Depends on:** None
- **Expected Outcome:** Template satisfying G-013
- **Verification:** G-013

#### T5: Create templates/final-report.md
- **Files:** `core/components/recipes/ship/templates/final-report.md` — create
- **Details:**
  - Header: `# Ship Complete`
  - `## Delivery Summary` table: Issue, Branch, PR, PR URL, Merge Commit, Strategy, Base Branch
  - `## Steps Executed` table: Step, Name, Status (completed|skipped|halted), Notes
  - `## Guardian Decisions` table: Step, Decision, Reason
  - `## Evidence`: link to `.meridian/{issue}/evidence/ship/{timestamp}.md`
  - `## Issues Created` (if any): list of self-resolution tracking issues
  - Follow `core/components/recipes/create-pr/templates/final-report.md` as structural pattern
- **Depends on:** None
- **Expected Outcome:** Template satisfying G-014
- **Verification:** G-014

#### T6: Update repo-orchestrator Bash scope
- **Files:** `core/components/agents/repo-orchestrator.md` — modify
- **Details:**
  - In `### BASH USAGE` section, add a "Write operations (named exceptions)" subsection
  - Add: `gh pr merge --squash --delete-branch {pr_number}` — rationale: "No merge skill exists; single deterministic command; used by /ship Step 4"
  - Add: `git checkout {base_branch} && git pull` — rationale: "No skill exists for syncing an existing protected branch; used by /ship Step 5"
  - Keep all existing Allowed read-only operations unchanged
  - Do NOT add to Available Skills table (these are Bash exceptions, not new skills)
- **Depends on:** T2 (confirms the exact Bash commands needed)
- **Expected Outcome:** repo-orchestrator.md allows these two write operations explicitly; G-022 passes
- **Verification:** G-022

#### T7: Modify commit-code to support auto_approve context
- **Files:** `core/components/recipes/commit-code/SKILL.md` — modify
- **Details:**
  - In Step 3 (Checkpoint), add as FIRST check before existing conditional auto-approve logic:
  - "If recipe context includes `ship_context.auto_approve: true`: write checkpoint artifact with Status: AUTO_APPROVED (do not skip writing — audit trail required); proceed to Step 4 without user prompt."
  - This must be the FIRST check in Step 3 — overrides conditional auto-approve entirely
  - Add note: "This bypass is only valid when orchestrated by an L2 recipe. Standalone invocations never receive ship_context."
  - The pre-flight checks (Steps 0-2) run normally — bypass only applies to the user-facing checkpoint
- **Depends on:** T2 (confirms ship_context structure and flag name)
- **Expected Outcome:** commit-code Step 3 checks ship_context.auto_approve first; bypasses prompt when true; G-020 passes
- **Verification:** G-020

#### T8: Modify create-pr to support auto_approve context
- **Files:** `core/components/recipes/create-pr/SKILL.md` — modify
- **Details:**
  - In Step 2 (Checkpoint), add BEFORE the existing `C5: always checkpoint` enforcement:
  - "If recipe context includes `ship_context.auto_approve: true` AND `analysis.blocking_issues` is empty AND all `checklist.must_have` items have `status: PASS` or `status: REVIEW` (none are FAIL): write checkpoint artifact with Status: AUTO_APPROVED; proceed to Step 3 without user prompt."
  - If `blocking_issues` is non-empty OR any `must_have.status == FAIL`: do NOT bypass — return to standard checkpoint (C5 still enforced)
  - Update Version table: note C5's "always checkpoint" is overrideable by L2 orchestration when quality is clean
- **Depends on:** T2 (confirms ship_context structure and quality gate conditions)
- **Expected Outcome:** create-pr Step 2 bypasses checkpoint only when quality is clean; G-021 passes
- **Verification:** G-021
